Actions.Text: AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO GOVERNMENTAL EMPLOYEES

Title: Authorizes Christopher Walser and Matthew Patire to each take the competitive civil service examination for the position of police officer
Summary: Authorizes Christopher Walser and Matthew Patire to each take the competitive civil service examination for the position of police officer and to each be placed on the eligible list for employment as a full-time police officer for the village of Skaneateles police department.
ActClause: AN ACT in relation to authorizing Christopher Walser and Matthew Patire to each take the competitive civil service examination for the position of police officer and be placed on the eligible list for employment as a full-time police officer for the village of Skaneateles police department
